---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem or limitation are you trying to solve?

## Proposed experience

Describe the behavior you would like, including where it belongs in the menu or window.

## Alternatives

What workarounds or alternative designs have you considered?

## Additional context

Add mockups, examples, or compatibility details if they help explain the request.

## Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues for a similar request.
- [ ] This request is focused on the problem and expected user experience.
- [ ] I understand the project currently accepts issues but not pull requests.
